description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the image ${PUBLIC_BUILDER_IMAGE_REGISTRY}/gitlab_provisioner:${BUILDER_IMAGE_REVISION} with stages check, create, configure, test, cleanup-prep, and cleanup and the variables defined in the file. In the check stage add ansible-lint (runs "cd ansible" then "ansible-lint pg_ha.yml" on pushes and merge requests), shellcheck (runs "apt-get install -y shellcheck" and "find \"${SRC_PATH}\"/scripts/* -type f \( ! -iname \"*.md\" \) | xargs -I {} shellcheck {}" on pushes and merge requests), and terraform-validate (runs "${SRC_PATH}/scripts/deploy/validate-provisioner" on pushes and merge requests). In the create stage add terraform-apply (creates "${PIPELINE_ARTIFACTS_PATH}" then runs "${SRC_PATH}/scripts/deploy/provision-cluster", stores that directory as an artifact, and runs only on trigger pipelines). In the configure stage add ansible-playbook (inherits the common before_script that exports environment variables and assembles inventory, then runs "${SRC_PATH}/scripts/deploy/run-orchestration" with one retry). In the test stage add gitlab-qa (uses the gitlab-qa-alpine-ruby-2.7 image with docker:stable-dind service, installs the gitlab-qa gem, logs into the registry, sources "${QA_IP_FILE}", sets GITLAB_QA_DEV_ACCESS_TOKEN, and runs "gitlab-qa Test::Instance::Any \"${QA_IMAGE}\" \"http://${APPLICATION_PUBLIC_IP}/\"", runs in parallel 5, allows failure, and uploads the qa directory as an artifact for six months). In the cleanup-prep stage add fetch-logs (creates a gitlab-logs folder, runs "${SRC_PATH}/scripts/deploy/fetch-cluster-logs", always uploads "ansible/gitlab-logs" as an artifact for one week, allows failure, and runs on triggers), and in the cleanup stage add terraform-destroy (runs "${SRC_PATH}/scripts/deploy/deprovision-cluster", is delayed by one day, runs only on triggers, and has no artifacts).
